name: Shrimp Salad with Grapefruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the shrimp as usual and peel them.
2. Peel the grapefruit and separate each piece; also peel the white skin, taking care to get complete pieces.
3. Prepare the dressing by mixing all the ingredients.
4. To serve: place the lettuce leaves in a dish, adorn with the grapefruit and shrimp, then drizzle with the dressing before serving.
5. For best results, prepare the dressing two hours ahead of time.
